evals.prompt_summary: JWT Bearer authentication for Weather API with scope validation
without_skill_failures: Uses Duende.IdentityServer.AccessTokenValidation for reference token introspection (mentioned AddOAuth2Introspection or generic approach)
Configures both JwtBearer and introspection in a dual scheme arrangement

evals.prompt_summary: Scope-based authorization policies for multiple API scopes
without_skill_failures: Claims check looks at the 'scope' claim type (not 'scp' or other)
Policy checks use RequireAssertion or RequireClaim with value matching against space-delimited or multiple scope claims
Uses [Authorize(Policy = "...")] on the controller/endpoint to enforce the policy
Mentions that scope claims may be a single space-delimited string OR multiple claims depending on JWT format
Mentions or configures AddDPoPAccessTokenEvents() for the DPoP nonce round-trip
Response includes reference to the Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer NuGet package
Uses AddLocalApi() on the IdentityServer builder (or AddLocalApiAuthentication()) for local API token validation
Specifies LocalApi.PolicyName or IdentityServerConstants.LocalApi.PolicyName as the authorization policy
Mentions that local API auth validates the access token issued by the same IdentityServer host without HTTP calls
Does NOT configure JWT Bearer or introspection for the local API endpoint — uses the built-in local API mechanism
Configures MTLS (AddMutualTlsSecretValidators) on IdentityServer for certificate-bound tokens
Mentions or configures confirmation claim (cnf) validation to bind the token to the client certificate thumbprint
Describes reverse proxy X-SSL-Cert header or connection-level certificate forwarding for mTLS termination

evals.prompt_summary: Supporting both JWT and reference tokens with dual authentication scheme
without_skill_failures: Uses ForwardDefaultSelector or a custom selector to route tokens to the correct scheme based on token format
Explains the token format detection logic (JWT tokens contain dots, reference tokens do not)
